title: Feeling gloomy about the economy? The ‘vibecession’ has arrived in Australia – but experts are less worried
summary_full: A poll shows most Australians think the country is either in a recession or will be soon. Economists have a different viewGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastAustralian households were already on edge before the bombs started falling in Iran.The cost of living was high and inflation was accelerating again, forcing the Reserve Bank to start ratcheting up interest rates.
